Package io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages

package io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire
     
  • Class
    Description
    Close
    The Zenoh transport-level CLOSE message.
    Declare
    The Zenoh network-level DECLARE message: a container that carries a single DeclareBody entry (DeclareSubscriber, UndeclareSubscriber, DeclareKeyExpr, etc.) plus network-message-level extensions (QoS, Timestamp, NodeId).
    Declare.Body
    DeclareBody union.
    Declare.Body.BodyKind
     
    DeclareSubscriber
    The Zenoh DeclareSubscriber sub-message: tells the router that we want to be routed messages matching a given key expression.
    Frame
    The Zenoh transport-level FRAME message: a container that carries one or more serialised network messages (typically Push) with a single shared sequence number.
    Hello
    The Zenoh scouting-level HELLO message.
    Init
    The Zenoh transport-level INIT message.
    Init.InitAck
    Immutable value carrier for the server's InitAck reply.
    Init.InitSyn
    Immutable value carrier for a client-side InitSyn.
    Interest
    The Zenoh network-level INTEREST message: asks the router to send us the DECLARE records (of subscribers / queryables / tokens / keyexprs) matching a given key expression.
    Interest.Mode
     
    KeepAlive
    The Zenoh transport-level KEEP_ALIVE message.
    Open
    The Zenoh transport-level OPEN message.
    Open.OpenAck
    Immutable value carrier for the server's OpenAck reply.
    Open.OpenSyn
    Immutable value carrier for a client-side OpenSyn.
    Push
    The Zenoh network-level PUSH message: a fire-and-forget carrier that routes a Put (or a Del) payload to a key expression.
    Put
    The Zenoh zenoh-level PUT message: the actual payload delivered under a key expression, carried as the body of a Push.
    Scout
    The Zenoh scouting-level SCOUT message.
    UndeclareSubscriber
    The Zenoh UndeclareSubscriber sub-message: tells the router that a previously-declared subscriber should be torn down.

Rebuilt from commit 2d2e383 at 2026-07-12 15:42 UTC
